related to a patient's dialysis would be covered (e.g., a skilled 
nursing visit to furnish wound care for an abandoned shunt site). Within these 
restrictions, beneficiaries may simultaneously receive items and services under the ESRD 
PPS through their ESRD facility at home at the same time as receiving items and services 
under the home health benefit that are not related to ESRD. 

80.6 - Prosthetic Devices 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3125F, HHA-230F
